nasb.text: Is this not David, of whom they sing in the dances, saying, ‘Saul has slain his thousands, And David his ten thousands’?”

esv.text: Is not this David, of whom they sing to one another in dances, ‘Saul has struck down his thousands, and David his ten thousands’?”

cnv.text: 這人不就是大衛嗎？從前以色列的婦女向他歌唱跳舞說： ‘掃羅殺死千千， 大衛殺死萬萬！’”

ccb.text: 以前妇女们跳舞歌唱‘扫罗杀死千千，大卫杀死万万’，歌颂的不就是这个大卫吗？”
